hero.title: Clinical investigation for cases other physicians could not solve
hero.subtitle: A reference in Mast Cell Activation Syndrome (MCAS), Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome (EDS) and Long COVID. For when a diagnosis takes more than 15 minutes.

validation.title: It is not "all in your head"
validation.body: How many doctors have you seen? How many times have you heard that "your tests are normal"? Your symptoms are real. It is not anxiety, and it is not imaginary. Here, you will be heard — and you will leave with clear direction.

method.title: Investigative medicine
method.body: Investigative medicine is not just ordering tests. It means correlating seemingly unrelated symptoms, recognizing patterns others miss, and having the courage to consider rare diagnoses.

items.d: Long consultations, active listening and correlation of multisystem symptoms.
Diagnoses grounded in solid scientific evidence and continuous training in rare conditions.
Clear direction — and the honesty to say "this is not my field, but I know who can help".
Multisystem symptoms, unexplained allergies, reactions to foods and medications.
Hypermobility, chronic pain, dislocations and associated comorbidities.
Persistent fatigue, brain fog and symptoms that remain after infection.
Investigation of non-restorative sleep, apnea, insomnia and excessive sleepiness.

blog.title: Blog — Science, translated clearly
blog.subtitle: Scientific content explained for you, without distorting simplifications.
blog.disclaimer: This content is for information only and does not replace a medical consultation. Always seek individualized care.

lp.symptomsNote: No single symptom confirms a diagnosis. It is the whole set that draws the pattern — and that set is what the investigation analyzes.

journeySteps.d: A long consultation covering every body system, with a symptom timeline and clinical correlation. Depth before answers.
Specific assessment according to the hypothesis: hypermobility, skin signs, standardized orthostatic measurement.
The right test, collected the right way, at the right time — not a generic panel that comes back normal.
Clear hypotheses, evidence-based management and, when the case requires another specialty, the correct referral.

lp.formTitle: Request an assessment of your case
lp.formLead: Fill in the details below and the team will get in touch to guide you on investigation and scheduling. The more context you bring, the more the first consultation delivers.
lp.medicalDisclaimer: This form does not provide a diagnosis and does not replace a medical consultation. The information submitted is used solely for contact and scheduling guidance, in accordance with Brazilian data protection law (LGPD).

form.title: Request an assessment
form.subtitle: Response within 2 business days.
form.name: Full name
form.phoneHint: Include country code. Optional, but speeds up contact.
form.duration: How long have you had these symptoms?
form.consent: I authorize contact and the processing of my data for scheduling purposes, under the LGPD.
form.successBody: The team will be in touch within 2 business days. You can also reach out directly on WhatsApp if you prefer.
form.error: We couldn't send this right now. Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.
form.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
form.errConsent: You must authorize contact to proceed.
